title: glaucium corniculatum subsp. tricolor
intro: Glaucium corniculatum subsp. tricolor, commonly known as horn poppy or poppy corniculatum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a sedative. The health benefits of Glaucium corniculatum subsp. tricolor include its potential to alleviate pain and treat conditions such as insomnia, anxiety, and menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the plant's alkaloids are often extracted and used in teas, tinctures, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
